mapper.select: SELECT id, folder_path, result_path, annotated_images_path, detected_images_count, detection_instances_count, normal_count, bent_count, deformed_count, rusty_count, missing_count, compromised_count, miss_detection_rate, start_time, finished_at, model_id FROM image_detection_data WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, folder_path, result_path, annotated_images_path, detected_images_count, detection_instances_count, normal_count, bent_count, deformed_count, rusty_count, missing_count, compromised_count, miss_detection_rate, start_time, finished_at, model_id FROM image_detection_data ORDER BY start_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE image_detection_data SET folder_path = #{folderPath}, result_path = #{resultPath}, annotated_images_path = #{annotatedImagesPath}, detected_images_count = #{detectedImagesCount}, detection_instances_count = #{detectionInstancesCount}, normal_count = #{normalCount}, bent_count = #{bentCount}, deformed_count = #{deformedCount}, rusty_count = #{rustyCount}, missing_count = #{missingCount}, compromised_count = #{compromisedCount}, miss_detection_rate = #{missDetectionRate}, start_time = #{startTime}, finished_at = #{finishedAt}, model_id = #{modelId} WHERE id = #{id}
